title: hepetis ferruginea
intro: Hepetis ferruginea, also known as Ironwort or Yellow Ironwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat iron deficiency anemia, thanks to its high iron content. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to provide health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal medicine, Hepetis ferruginea is often combined with other herbs to create remedies for various health issues, including menstrual cramps, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
